message:
Fix TCP operator shutdown

Make the TCP accept loops stop reliably during shutdown.

The previous code called server_->close() while an accept coroutine
could still be suspended. Folly's ServerSocket::accept() does not wake
up just because accepting stops, so shutdown could depend on later
scope cancellation. Closing the socket also needs to happen on the
socket event-base thread.

This change adds an explicit cancellation source for the accept loops,
runs server shutdown on the event-base thread, and treats
OperationCancelled as a normal exit path. It applies the same fix to
accept_tcp and serve_tcp.

TCP integration tests for accept_tcp, from_tcp, serve_tcp, and to_tcp
pass with this change.
